task_completion.description: Log in to NOSH ChartingSystem successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or calendar is visible, and there is an indication of being logged in as Dr. James Carter or at Hillside Family Medicine.

task_completion.description: Select the correct patient for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment scheduling form or modal, 'Coreen Treutel' is entered or selected in the patient field.

task_completion.description: Set the correct date and time for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scheduling form shows the date set to June 20, 2026 (e.g., 06/20/2026) and the time set to 9:00 AM (or 09:00).

task_completion.description: Set the appointment type, provider, and purpose.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scheduling form shows 'Office Visit' as the visit type, 'Dr. James Carter' as the provider, and 'routine follow-up' (or similar) in the reason/purpose field.

task_completion.description: Save the appointment so it appears on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view for June 20, 2026 shows a scheduled appointment block at 9:00 AM for Coreen Treutel.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, with no terminal windows executing SQL or curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the genuine NOSH ChartingSystem application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local URL for NOSH, and the interface matches a real web application rather than a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manually alter the HTML of the calendar to show the appointment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Coreen Treutel (DOB: 1990-07-20). Provider: Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider). Practice: Hillside Family Medicine. Appointment Date: 2026-06-20. Appointment Time: 09:00 (9:00 AM). Appointment Type: Office Visit. Purpose: routine follow-up visit.
